docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,256.01 FILED BY SIGAL, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT MOSTOUFI, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED AUG-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOSTOUFI, ALI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 06/12/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-TEMPORARILY AWAY-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGAL, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSTOUFI, ALI $2,256.01 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,306.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IT IS SO ORDERED THAT SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED ACTION. FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSTOUFI, ALI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
